Text:
Day two of the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 and the doors open at midday.

Yesterday was a brilliant start, thank you to everyone who came through the gates on Thursday evening and made it such a great opening session. The bar is stocked, the team is ready and there is plenty of the good stuff still to enjoy. Whether you are coming back for more or joining us for the first time today, we look forward to seeing you.

Doors open at 12pm today, closing at 11pm.

Advance tickets still available:
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
Alt text(s): Hand holding an official 2026 Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival glass full of pale beer with white foam, featuring the festival's pink and blue hedgehog design and Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 text||Group of six smiling people seated around a long wooden table inside the festival marquee, raising glasses of beer, with CAMRA branding visible in the background||Queue of attendees at the festival entry tent, a volunteer in a pink Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival t-shirt speaking with arriving visitors, entry pricing sign visible on the right||Two pink-shirted festival volunteers serving behind the Real Ale bar, rows of cloth-covered casks with sponsor placards on display, large Real Ale banner overhead
